sourcingNotes.poolAssessment: Category 6 (hotel interior — design & room). Preferred sources Unsplash → Pexels → venue-media-kit. Same blocker as eat-hub-hero-01: Unsplash and Pexels anti-bot, Commons pool has no editorial-grade design-hotel interiors, venue media-kit outreach not yet authorised. No honest candidate list can be produced from this session.
sourcingNotes.blocker: See eat-hub-hero-01 sourcingNotes.blocker. Same root cause, same unblock paths.
sourcingNotes.recommendedUnblockPath: Same three options as eat-hub-hero-01. For the stay hub specifically, venue media-kit outreach to Jackalope Hotel is the highest-fidelity path — Jackalope is the Peninsula's design-hotel icon and the image most editorially defensible for this slot will be one of its own suites.

editorActionsRequested.question: See eat-hub-hero-01. Same decision point covers this slot.
